title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
description: A shocking psychological thriller of a woman's act of violence against her husband.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship for writing robust, maintainable code.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: A landmark volume in science writing exploring the depths of the universe.

title: Where the Crawdads Sing
author: Delia Owens
description: A coming-of-age murder mystery set in the quiet marshes of North Carolina.

title: JavaScript: The Good Parts
author: Douglas Crockford
description: Unearthing the excellence in JavaScript to create truly effective web applications.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description: An evolutionary perspective on genetics and the biological drive to survive.

title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: A sweeping science fiction epic of politics, religion, and survival on a desert planet.

title: You Don't Know JS
author: Kyle Simpson
description: A deep dive into the core mechanisms of the JavaScript language.

title: Cosmos
author: Carl Sagan
description: A journey through space and time, exploring our place in the universe.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A philosophical tale about a young shepherd's journey to find his personal legend.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A brief history of humankind, exploring how biology and history have defined us.
